data.content: Refined terminal tab overflow UX: compact beat-id label formatting now shortens long prefix/local IDs without wrapping, tab chips tightened in compact mode, and mouse wheel now scrolls horizontally when overflowed. Added unit tests for compact label formatting in terminal-tab-strip helpers. Quality gates: bun run lint (existing repo warnings only), bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, NODE_ENV=production bun run build. Integrated on main as 36b8b28 and pushed to origin/main.
